creator: manu@freebsd.org
text:
Mhm, looks like you have an aspeed bmc in there ([101050.850] (--) PCI: (6@0:0:0) 1a03:2000:15d9:1b8e rev 82, Mem @ 0xa4000000/16777216, 0xa5000000/262144, I/O @ 0x00000000/128, BIOS @ 0x????????/65536), maybe something changed in Xorg autoconfiguration and it tries to use it.
Can you test with a configuration file ? Just generate one and remove the aspeed video card from it.
